target.title: fix(hooks): wire message:sending internal hook to user-defined hooks
target.body:
## Summary

Wire the `message:sending` internal hook to user-defined hooks so that hook handlers registered via `[hooks]` configuration can intercept outgoing messages before delivery. Previously only internal consumers could observe this event; user-defined hooks never fired for `message:sending`.

## Problem

User-defined `message:sending` hook handlers never fired because no internal bridge existed from the hook runner to outbound message delivery. The hook was defined in the internal hook system but was disconnected from the user-facing hook pipeline.

## Root Cause

The `message:sending` hook was only wired through the internal hook bridge (used by bundled features), but was never connected to the user-defined hook runner. The delivery path called the internal hook runner but never forwarded the event to user-defined handlers.

## Fix

Wire `message:sending` through the user-defined hook pipeline in the delivery path. This allows users to intercept, modify, or block outgoing messages via their configured hook handlers.

## Verification

- `src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts`: verifies the internal hook bridge correctly forwards `message:sending` to the hook runner
- `src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts`: verifies user-defined hook handlers receive `message:sending` events during message delivery
- `src/infra/heartbeat-runner.tool-response.test.ts`: verifies heartbeat tool responses don't trigger spurious hook events

## Real Behavior Proof

- **Behavior addressed**: User-defined `message:sending` hook handlers never fired because no internal bridge existed from the hook runner to outbound message delivery. After the fix, configured hooks receive `message:sending` events before messages are delivered.
- **Real environment tested**: Linux (Node.js 22), openclaw development checkout, vitest 4.1.8.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  ```
  ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts
  ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts
  ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/infra/heartbeat-runner.tool-response.test.ts
  ```
- **Evidence after fix**:
  ```
  ✓ src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts (36 tests, 100% pass, 1.88s)
  ✓ src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts (96 tests, 100% pass, 7.64s)
  ✓ src/infra/heartbeat-runner.tool-response.test.ts (16 tests, 100% pass, 7.69s)
  ```
  Total: 148 tests passed, 0 failed.
- **Observed result after fix**: All 148 related tests pass. The internal hook bridge correctly forwards `message:sending` to the user-defined hook runner, and delivery path invokes user-defined hooks before outbound delivery.
- **What was not tested**: End-to-end roundtrip through a real channel adapter (requires live credentials). The hook contract at the plugin SDK boundary is tested via the internal hook bridge tests.

Fixes #94340
target.author: mazhuima
